overview: A standalone Node.js proxy server that polls the Twelve Data REST API every 2 minutes for configurable forex currency pair rates, caches them in memory, and exposes clean REST endpoints. Ready to deploy on Render.com.
features: Polls Twelve Data every 2 minutes for forex rates on configurable currency pairs
/rates endpoint returns all cached pair prices with timestamps
/health endpoint returns server status without triggering API calls
Graceful fallback to last cached prices when Twelve Data is unavailable
Console logging for every poll cycle
Configurable via TWELVEDATA_API_KEY and FOREX_PAIRS environment variables
